title: config_change_tracking
description: One configuration-change tracking facility — AWS Config recorder, GCP Cloud Asset Inventory feed, Azure Policy assignment. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for recording-status and coverage checks. Named for the compliance concept (is resource-change tracking enabled and comprehensive?) rather than any one vendor's product.

id.description: Unique stable identifier (AWS Config: recorder ARN or name).

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

is_recording.description: Change tracking is actively recording resource changes.

all_resource_types.description: Configured for all supported resource types (not a subset).
